_comment: Project-scoped permissions for the autonomous build harness. deny rules are ABSOLUTE (no scope, and not even bypass mode, can re-allow them). We allow broad tooling for a trusted build repo but hard-deny catastrophic ops + secret reads. run.sh runs in --permission-mode dontAsk (fail-loud); unlisted tools fail instead of prompting. includeCoAuthoredBy=false strips the Claude co-author git trailer.
